creator: maxclsb@gmail.com
text:
I think gui and network are run depends while moc and rcc are build
depends.
Do you know what kind of depends uic and linguist are?


On Sun, Feb 9, 2014 at 7:34 AM, Jason Bacon <bacon@uwm.edu> wrote:

>
> I did another build on a 9.2-RELEASE system with no QT packages
> preinstalled.
>
> I think the following is a sufficient list:
>
> USE_QT4=    gui network uic moc rcc linguist
>
> It pulls in assistant and several others as dependencies.
>
>
